memoryArtifacts.headline: Thomas Richardson III married Margaret Silverside in June1567 at St. Albans Abbey.

Thomas Richardson
(15 March 1543 – 4 March 1630)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Thomas was born in St. Albana Abbey in Westmil and married on 15 Jun 1567 at St. Mary the Virgin to Mary Margaret Silverside. 

They are parents of at least one child:

Thomas Richardson - 24 Aug 1565 …

memoryArtifacts.headline: could not find the sine g.o.t Thomas Richardson, but I got great photos of church.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Richardson III於1543年3月15日出生在英國賀特福爾賀特福德時，他的父親Thomas Richardson II19歲，母親Mary Champney16歲。他於1567年6月15日與Margaret Silverside在英國賀特福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1630年3月4日在他的家鄉享年86歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Richardson III于1543年3月15日出生在英国賀特福爾賀特福德时，他的父亲Thomas Richardson II19岁，母亲Mary Champney16岁。他于1567年6月15日与Margaret Silverside在英国賀特福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1630年3月4日在他的家乡享年86岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾維斯特米爾。

nameMeanings.name: Richardson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Richard + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans. Compare Ritson .
Americanized form (and a Swedish variant) of Swedish Richardsson or Rikardsson: patronymic from the personal name Richard , Rikard.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Richardsen or Norwegian Rikardsen, cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Richerson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson   or perhaps a patronymic from   Richer  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Richeson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson  , but compare   Richerson  .

variants.name: Ritson
meanings: variant of Richson, a shortened form of Richardson . The name may sometimes have been confused with or assimilated to Rushton .
in southern England perhaps a habitational name from Ritson, in Halwell (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Richardson III was born on 15 March 1543, in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Thomas Richardson II, was 19 and his mother, Mary Champney, was 16. He married Margaret Silverside on 15 June 1567, in Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 4 March 1630, in his hometown, at the age of 86, and was buried in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Richardson III est né le 15 mars 1543, à Hertford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Richardson II, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mary Champney, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Silverside le 15 juin 1567, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 mars 1630, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Westmill, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Richardson III am 15. März 1543 in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Richardson II 19 und seine Mutter Mary Champney 16. Er hat am 15. Juni 1567 in Hertfordshire, England Margaret Silverside geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. März 1630 im Alter von 86 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Richardson III è nato il il 15 marzo 1543 nel Hertford, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Richardson II, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Mary Champney, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Silverside il 15 giugno 1567, nel Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 marzo 1630, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a Westmill, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Richardson IIIが1543年3月15日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハートフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas Richardson IIは19歳，母Mary Champneyは16歳であった。1567年6月15日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアでMargaret Silversideと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1630年3月4日に故郷で86歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Richardson III(이)가 1543년 3월 15일 영국 허트퍼드실르 허트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Richardson II(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Champney(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1567년 6월 15일 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 Margaret Silverside(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1630년 3월 4일 그의 고향에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 웨스트미에 묻혔다.

pt.15 March 1543–4 March 1630: 15 de março de 1543–4 de março de 1630
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Richardson III nasceu em 15 de março de 1543, em Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Richardson II, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Mary Champney, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Silverside em 15 de junho de 1567, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de março de 1630, em sua cidade natal, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Richardson III родился 15 марта 1543 г. в местности хиртфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Richardson II было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Champney, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Silverside 15 июня 1567 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 4 марта 1630 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.15 March 1543–4 March 1630: 15 de marzo de 1543–4 de marzo de 1630
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Richardson III nació el 15 de marzo de 1543, en Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Richardson II, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Mary Champney, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Margaret Silverside el 15 de junio de 1567, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1630, en su pueblo, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
